calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-07-2014 Off Calendar

Ntc And Req. For Prove-Up Hearing For Entry Of Default Judgment; Summary Of The Case
Off Calendar Dec-12-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Bernard J. Mayanski, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff, PRESENTCREATIVE, LLC, a California limited liability company, aka Present Creative, LLC.
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) HIVE MEDIA, INC., a California corporation.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-10 dismissed without prejudice.
Declarations filed in support for request for Default Judgment Prove-up are admitted in evidence.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $34,705.06
Pre-Judgment Interest: $5,752.48
Attorney's Fees: $1,000.00
Costs: $525.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $41,982.54
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-11-2013 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jan-28-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Off Calendar Jul-15-2013 Continued To Oct-30-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
